debug_info.goal:
x y z : ℝ
h₀ : 0 ≤ x ∧ 0 ≤ y ∧ 0 ≤ z
h₁ : x + y + z = 1
⊢ 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ∧ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27

proof:
have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2,
      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z) = (y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z) := rfl
    rw [h₄]
    cases' le_total x y with h h <;>
      cases' le_total y z with h' h' <;>
        cases' le_total z x with h'' h'' <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z),
                sq_nonneg (z - x)]
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z),
                sq_nonneg (z - x), mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2,
                mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2]
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z),
                sq_nonneg (z - x), mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2,
                mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]
            })
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

      have h₉ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
      nlinarith
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2 * z), sq_nonneg (y + z - 2 * x),
      sq_nonneg (z + x - 2 * y)]
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      have h₇ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
      have h₈ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
      have h₉ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
      positivity
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x)]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> ring
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      have h₉ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
      have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
      have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
      positivity
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2 * z), sq_nonneg (y + z - 2 * x),
      sq_nonneg (z + x - 2 * y)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h_lower : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    have h₂ : 0 ≤ x * y := by
      nlinarith
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ y * z := by
      nlinarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ z * x := by
      nlinarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      have h₅₁ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
      have h₅₂ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
      have h₅₃ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
      positivity
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z)]
  
  have h_upper : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₂ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by rw [h₁]; norm_num
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2,
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - z),

  exact ⟨h_lower, h_upper⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2,
      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    have h₄ : (y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z) = (y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z) := rfl
    rw [h₄]
    cases' le_total x y with h h <;>
      cases' le_total y z with h' h' <;>
        cases' le_total z x with h'' h'' <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z),
                sq_nonneg (z - x)]
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z),
                sq_nonneg (z - x), mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2,
                mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2]
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z),
                sq_nonneg (z - x), mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2,
                mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]
            })
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    -- Prove the lower bound: 0 ≤ yz + zx + xy - 2xyz
    have h₃ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ x * y := by positivity
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ y * z := by positivity
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ z * x := by positivity
    have h₉ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by positivity
    have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by positivity
    nlinarith [mul_nonneg h₃ h₄, mul_nonneg h₄ h₅, mul_nonneg h₅ h₃,
      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₃ h₄) h₅]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    -- Prove the upper bound: yz + zx + xy - 2xyz ≤ 7/27
    have h₄ : (x + y + z) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      rw [h₁]
      <;> ring
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2,
      mul_nonneg h₀.2.2 h₀.1, sq_nonneg (x + y + z),
      sq_nonneg (x - y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - z),
      sq_nonneg (x - y - z)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by

  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    cases' le_total x y with h h <;>
    cases' le_total y z with h' h' <;>
    cases' le_total z x with h'' h'' <;>
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2 * z), sq_nonneg (x + z - 2 * y),
      sq_nonneg (y + z - 2 * x)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]

    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y := by nlinarith
    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y * z := by nlinarith
    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z * x := by nlinarith
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      apply mul_nonneg
      · apply mul_nonneg <;> nlinarith
      · nlinarith
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - z),
      sq_nonneg (x - y - z)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by

    have h₇ : 0 ≤ y * z := by positivity

    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),

  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by

      <;> norm_num
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ x * y := by

    have h₆ : 0 ≤ y * z := by

    have h₇ : 0 ≤ z * x := by
      nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2.2]
    have h₈ : 0 ≤ x * y * z := by
      have h₉ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
      have h₁₀ : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
      have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
      positivity
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      sq_nonneg (x + y + z), sq_nonneg (x - y + z), sq_nonneg (x + y - z),
      sq_nonneg (x - y - z)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩

have h₂ : 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z := by
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (y - z), sq_nonneg (z - x),
      mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1, mul_nonneg h₀.2.1 h₀.2.2, mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.2,
      mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg h₀.1 h₀.2.1) h₀.2.2]
  
  have h₃ : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ (7 : ℝ) / (27 : ℝ) := by
    -- Use cases to simplify the problem
    cases' le_total 0 (x - y) with h h <;>
      cases' le_total 0 (y - z) with h' h' <;>
        cases' le_total 0 (z - x) with h'' h'' <;>

            sq_nonneg (z - x), sq_nonneg (x + y - 2 * z), sq_nonneg (y + z - 2 * x),
            sq_nonneg (z + x - 2 * y)]
  
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩
